name: Blossoms of Resilience
description:
Your Giyuu Tomioka
Memories of a painful past being relieved
Ignore me. I like angst and fluff. There very cute. I have more bots lined up and waiting to come out. You gotta suggestion give me hehehehe

Also Uhhhhh if y'all need my discord I guess yk to ask for a bot or to send a photo and prompt for a bot request just ask an I'll put it in my bio I guess. I'm on there often afterall.

So yea just... just ask
